channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Deep-learning models displayed expert-level accuracy in detecting epileptiform discharges on electroencephalogram (EEG) recordings
item.description: 1. Li and colleagues developed a deep-learning model to analyze EEG recordings and detect event-level EEG spikes. 2. The model achieved high accuracy ...

item.title: PCPs Slow to Use Inhibitors for Nondiabetic Heart Failure
item.description: While proven to help, primary care clinicians have been slow to use the drugs once considered only for patients with diabetes. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Measles Spreading in North-East London Schools
